page_meta.base_description: Stardewdle - The daily Stardew Valley guessing game! Take on new challenges every day and test your Battle Royale knowledge

want_more.title: Want more ?
want_more.description: Check out the biggest hub for all dle games.

about.title: About
about.discover: Welcome to Stardewdle, the premier daily Stardew Valley guessing game! Test your knowledge of the Stardew Valley universe through 6 exciting game modes: Classic, Emoji, Quote, Ability, Signature, and Rank. Discover a new Villager daily and challenge yourself with our unique -dle game experience directly inspired by the popular Stardew Valley competitive villager shooter.
about.disclaimer: Stardewdle is a fan project created with passion using assets owned by Supercell. Supercell does not endorse or sponsor this project. Stardew Valley and all associated characters are registered trademarks of Supercell.

dle_games.title: Join the Popular -dle Games Trend with Stardewdle
dle_games.description: Stardewdle brings the addictive daily guessing format to the Stardew Valley universe. Like Wordle, Heardle, and other popular -dle games, Stardewdle offers fresh puzzles daily that test your knowledge in fun, engaging ways. Our multiple unique game modes make Stardewdle the most comprehensive Stardew Valley guessing game available.

commitment.title: Our Commitment to the Stardew Valley Community
commitment.description: Stardewdle is much more than just a game. It's a daily challenge created by fans, for fans, that immerses you in the exciting universe of Stardew Valley. We meticulously research each character to ensure accuracy in our daily challenges across all game modes. As the Stardew Valley roster expands, so does our database, ensuring you always have fresh content to enjoy in this ultimate Stardew Valley guessing game experience.

game_modes.title: Six Exciting Game Modes in Our Daily Stardew Valley Challenge
game_modes.description: Stardewdle offers unmatched variety with multiple distinct game modes: Classic mode tests your knowledge of character attributes, Emoji mode challenges you to identify villagers from five emojis with one revealed per guess, Quote mode presents in-game character dialogue for you to match with the right villager, Ability mode shows an image of a character's ability for identification, and Signature mode displays a villager's written signature for you to recognize. Each day brings new Stardew Valley challenges across all modes!

inspiration.title: Inspired by Stardew Valley and the Popular -dle Games Format
inspiration.description: Stardewdle combines the addictive daily puzzle format popularized by Wordle with the rich character universe of Stardew Valley. Our guessing game offers the perfect way to test your Stardew Valley knowledge and prove you're a true fan of this popular mobile battle game. Join thousands of Stardew Valley enthusiasts who challenge themselves daily with our unique guessing puzzles.

credit.title: Original Inspiration
credit.description: Originally inspired by Dale Dai's Stardewdle.io, the original Stardew Valley daily guessing game.

privacy.title: Privacy and Data Use
privacy.description: We respect your privacy. Stardewdle uses cookies to collect statistics and personalize your daily guessing game experience. To learn more about our privacy policy, please visit our dedicated section.

about.thanks: Thank you for being part of the Stardewdle community! New Stardew Valley characters and challenges await you daily!

signature.team: The Stardewdle Team - Passionate Stardew Valley Fans

how_to_play_classic.title: How to Play Stardewdle: Classic Mode
how_to_play_classic.introduction_description: Guess the secret Stardew Valley villager of the day. Analyze six attributes; each guess gives color-coded feedback and directional arrows to guide you.
how_to_play_classic.attributes_description: Classic Mode compares these six attributes:
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_2: • Region: where they live (Town, Mountain, Forest, Beach, Desert, Sewers, Ginger Island).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_3: • Season: their birthday season (Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_4: • Birthday: the day of the month they were born (1–28).
how_to_play_classic.attribute_item_5: • Marriageable: whether you can marry them (Yes or No).
how_to_play_classic.feedback_item_1: • Green: exact match with the secret villager.
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrows: Arrows appear on Birthday and Age:
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_up: • Arrow Up (↑): the secret villager's value is HIGHER (later birthday / older).
how_to_play_classic.feedback_arrow_down: • Arrow Down (↓): the secret villager's value is LOWER (earlier birthday / younger).
how_to_play_classic.step_1: Make your first guess of any villager from the search list.
how_to_play_classic.step_2: Watch each attribute tile flip in sequence, revealing color-coded feedback.
how_to_play_classic.step_3: Read the green and red tiles to spot matching and non-matching attributes.
how_to_play_classic.step_4: Use the arrows on Birthday and Age to narrow the range.
how_to_play_classic.step_5: Make your next guess based on all the feedback received.
how_to_play_classic.step_6: Continue until you correctly identify the secret villager!
how_to_play_classic.step_7: Return daily for a new villager to guess in Classic Mode.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_1: • Start with villagers you know well to establish a baseline of attributes.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_2: • Region and Season narrow the pool fast — many villagers share them.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_3: • Use arrows to eliminate whole groups by birthday or age.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_4: • Age is ordinal: Child < Teen < Adult.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_5: • A villager must match ALL green feedback at once.
how_to_play_classic.strategy_tip_6: • Gender, Region, Season and Marriageable match exactly (no arrows).
how_to_play_classic.daily_challenge_description: Return each day for a new secret villager. Track your streak and share your result with friends.

how_to_play_pixel.title: How to Play Stardewdle: Pixel Mode - Progressive Portrait Revelation Challenge
how_to_play_pixel.introduction_title: Identify Stardew Valley Characters from Pixelated Portraits
how_to_play_pixel.introduction_description: Pixel Mode offers a unique visual challenge where you must identify Stardew Valley characters from heavily pixelated portraits that gradually become clearer with each guess. This innovative daily guessing game tests your ability to recognize villagers from limited visual information, perfect for both casual players and dedicated fans.
how_to_play_pixel.gameplay_description: In this Stardew Valley character guessing challenge, you'll be presented with a heavily pixelated portrait of a villager. Your mission is to identify the character as quickly as possible. With each incorrect guess, the image becomes progressively less pixelated, revealing more details to help you identify the correct villager.
how_to_play_pixel.pixelation_system_description: The Pixel Mode features a dynamic clarity system:
how_to_play_pixel.pixelation_phase_1: • Initial Phase: The portrait starts heavily pixelated, making identification extremely challenging. Only the most distinctive features and color patterns are visible.
how_to_play_pixel.pixelation_phase_2: • Progressive Reveal: With each guess, the pixelation level decreases, gradually revealing more details of the villager's portrait. After about 12 guesses, the image becomes completely clear.
how_to_play_pixel.pixelation_phase_3: • Victory Reveal: When you correctly identify the villager, the portrait instantly becomes crystal clear, revealing the character in full detail.
how_to_play_pixel.strategy_tip_1: • Focus on dominant colors and color patterns in the pixelated image—many villagers have signature color schemes.
how_to_play_pixel.strategy_tip_2: • Look for distinctive shapes and silhouettes, even when heavily pixelated—some villagers have unique head shapes or accessories.
how_to_play_pixel.strategy_tip_3: • Pay attention to the background color, which reflects the villager's rarity and can help narrow down possibilities.
how_to_play_pixel.strategy_tip_4: • Use the process of elimination—if you've already guessed certain villagers, focus on those you haven't tried yet.
how_to_play_pixel.strategy_tip_5: • Consider the overall composition—some villagers have distinctive poses or positioning in their portraits.
how_to_play_pixel.strategy_tip_6: • As the image becomes clearer, look for unique accessories, facial features, or costume elements that distinguish specific characters.
how_to_play_pixel.daily_challenge_description: Each day brings a new Pixel Mode challenge with a different Stardew Valley character to identify! This daily guessing game sharpens your visual recognition skills and tests your familiarity with character designs in the Stardew Valley universe. Challenge yourself to identify villagers with the fewest guesses and share your results with friends!

how_to_play.title: How to Play Stardewdle: Emoji Mode
how_to_play.introduction_description: In Emoji Mode, you are shown emojis that represent a villager and must guess which one it is. A new emoji is revealed with each wrong guess.
how_to_play.step_1: Look carefully at the emoji(s) displayed.
how_to_play.step_2: Think about which villager these emojis represent.
how_to_play.step_3: Type or select your guess from the list.
how_to_play.step_4: Return tomorrow for a new emoji challenge!
